channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI megaprojects come with hidden costs
item.description: While Tesla’s stock has seen a sharp decline in recent weeks, Elon Musk has quietly been working to expand his influence in a different area of tech: AI supercomputing. Recent reports have revealed that Musk’s AI startup, xAI, has been quietly building a new data center in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Jason Ludwig, Fast Company

item.title: An Apple a day? Your iPhone could soon have an AI Doctor thanks to a new iOS 19 Health app
item.description: Apple is said to be prepping a Health app upgrade for iOS 19 that will reportedly feature an AI agent that could replicate a real doctor.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: How IT certification can help you earn more
item.description: Your weekly round-up of the questions asked by readers of CIO, Computerworld, CSO, InfoWorld, and Network World sees Smart Answers offering advice on how IT security certifications help career advancement; how can companies overcome the complexity of S/4HANA migration projects; and why are cloud cre
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tesla protests across Bay Area ignite Trump resistance, but intra-party strife ahead
item.description: After almost stunned paralysis among Democrats in the early weeks of Trump’s onslaught of executive orders, the Trump resistance is gaining traction.
item.dc:creator: Julia Prodis Sulek, The Mercury News

item.title: How to sync iPhone and iPad – iCloud, Photos, Calendars, and more
item.description: One of the big perks of buying an Apple product is the iCloud ecosystem, which keeps everything updated and connected across your devices – here’s how to sync your iPhone and iPad.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: New 3D technology could soon bring surgeons closer to patients in Africa's most remote regions
item.description: A groundbreaking initiative could soon be bringing surgeons closer to patients in Africa's remote corners where the doctor-to-patients ratio is among the lowest in the world.
item.dc:creator: Naa Adorkor Cudjoe, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI startup just bought X for $45 billion
item.description: Elon Musk said on Friday that his xAI has acquired X, the social media app formerly known as Twitter, in an all-stock transaction for $45 billion, including $12 billion in debt. “xAI and X’s futures are intertwined.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Here’s your first hands-on look at the Star Wars: Grogu, Mandalorian, R2-D2, and Darth Vader earbuds
item.description: Star Wars has collaborated with Audio-Technica for four custom earbuds, and TechRadar has your exclusive first-look hands-on experience with all four.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Democrats ask ethics office to investigate Lutnick Tesla promotion
item.description: More than a dozen Democratic lawmakers asked the Office of Government Ethics on Thursday to open an investigation into Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick’s promotion of Tesla stock. Rep. Maxine Waters (D-Calif.), Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google introduces Gemini 2.5 reasoning models
item.description: Google has introduced version 2.5 of its Gemini AI model, which the company said offers a new level of performance by combining an enhanced base model with improved post-training.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: ECMAScript 2025 JavaScript standard takes shape
item.description: ECMAScript 2025, the next version of an ECMA International standard for JavaScript, will standardize new JavaScript capabilities ranging from JSON modules to import attributes, new Set methods, sync iterator helpers, and regular expression modifiers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk says he sold X to his AI company
item.description: Elon Musk on Friday evening announced he has sold his social media company, X, to xAI, his artificial intelligence company, in a deal that values X at $33 billion.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Nvidia's AI Chip Shortage Hits China's Tech Scene
item.description: Nvidia's H20 chip shortage creates obstacles for China's AI ambitions
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: How the Navy is removing barriers to IT modernization
item.description: Barry Tanner, the deputy CIO for the Department of the Navy, said the initiative to reduce and eliminate duplicative applications is targeting business systems. The post How the Navy is removing barriers to IT modernization first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: What to know about earthquakes like the one that hit Myanmar
item.description: A major 7.7 magnitude earthquake that originated near Mandalay, Myanmar shook the Earth as far as Bangkok.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This may be the most private and secure cloud-based AI solution around
item.description: What if you could build a business-specific generative AI (genAI) solution that was hosted in the cloud? What if that cloud used the most energy-efficient systems in the world? And what if those services were also all running on the world’s most secure computing platform, the Mac? Wonder no more, b
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft sets May end date for Skype after 14-year run
item.description: Microsoft is discontinuing Skype in May after 22 years of service. Kurt the CyberGuy addresses other options for internet-based phone and video service.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: La transformación digital, esencial para la supervivencia del sector asegurador
item.description: Los beneficios de la transformación digital ya son palpables para el sector asegurador. Así lo constata el informe Perspectivas de tecnología en seguros 2025: transformando la innovación en ventaja competitiva que firma Concentrix.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La Diputación de Girona optimiza el uso de sus recursos mediante la automatización
item.description: El Departamento de Intervención de la Diputación de Girona ha implementado de la mano de Atos un proyecto de automatización de procesos (RPA).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meet the DOGE team
item.description: Several members of Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) made their first public appearance as a team to make the case for their cost-cutting efforts amid growing pushback.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: An AI pioneer is launching a blockchain-powered marketplace for open-source models and applications
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts
item.description: The DOGE impact on federal cyber spending remains to be seen, but cyber program leaders are hoping to avoid any major cuts by emphasizing the ROI. The post Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Kyndryl extends Google Cloud partnership for AI-based mainframe modernization
item.description: Kyndryl and Google Cloud are expanding their partnership to help customers use generative AI to move data off the mainframe and into the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Senate Republican: Taylor Swift could write song about 'terrible breakup' between Musk, liberals
item.description: Sen. Bernie Moreno (R-Ohio) joked Thursday about the “terrible breakup” between Elon Musk and liberals, as Democrats denounce the tech billionaire’s prominent role in the Trump administration. After Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ClickFix malware tricks you into infecting your own Windows PC
item.description: Hackers are tricking people into installing password-stealing malware by making them press keyboard shortcuts under the pretense of proving they're not bots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: News and insights
item.description: Nvidia GTC 2025 has become a landmark event, solidifying the company’s position at the forefront of the AI technology. This year the major theme was agentic AI, which represents a shift from data generation to AI systems capable of autonomous reasoning and decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Preserve loved ones' voicemails on iPhone
item.description: Saving the voices of loved ones can be a comforting way to keep alive memories. Kurt "the CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to preserve voicemail messages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump floats reducing tariffs on China to secure TikTok deal
item.description: President Trump on Wednesday floated reducing tariffs on China to get a TikTok divestiture deal done as the April 5 deadline nears.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Federal News Network’s CX Exchange 2025
item.description: End-to-End Experience – The evolution of federal service delivery The post Federal News Network’s CX Exchange 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: The Apple rumor machine cranks into gear for iOS 19
item.description: WWDC event marketing intensifies, and as we head toward that event in a little over two months, it looks as if we’re being told to expect a new paint job (aka user interface change)s for iOS.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
